scripts.start:studio: npm run build --workspace=formspec-engine && npm run build --workspace=formspec-layout && npm run build --workspace=formspec-webcomponent &&  npm run dev --workspace=form-builder
scripts.test:unit: npm run --workspace formspec-engine test && npm run --workspace formspec-webcomponent test && npm run --workspace formspec-layout test && npm run --workspace formspec-studio-core test
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.start:references: npm run build --workspace=formspec-engine && npm run build --workspace=formspec-layout && npm run build --workspace=formspec-webcomponent && npm run dev --workspace=formspec-references
